extra.reason: Phase 2 Wave A merged in PR #13. core schema.rs: sys.* introspection (databases/tables/views/columns) + canonical column types (format_sql_type) + SchemaCache with invalidate seam. 93 headless tests; SQL verified vs MS Learn. Live sys.* validation is the user's env-gated test run.

Phase 2 Wave A merged in PR #13. core schema.rs: sys.* introspection (databases/tables/views/columns) + canonical column types (format_sql_type) + SchemaCache with invalidate seam. 93 headless tests; SQL verified vs MS Learn. Live sys.* validation is the user's env-gated test run.

Phase 2 Wave B merged in PR #14. Object tree UI (Databases/Tables/Columns/Views, lazy-load) + 4 schema Tauri commands via SchemaCache. v1 nodes only; rqb.4/5/6 are TODO seams. Agent gates green; live tree render is the user's tauri dev step.

Phase 2 Wave C merged in PR #15. Double-click table -> SELECT TOP 1000 tab (rqb.6), Refresh -> invalidate cache + remount tree (rqb.5), grey + disable non-ONLINE dbs (rqb.4). Agent gates green; live behavior is the user's tauri dev step.

Phase 2 Wave C merged in PR #15. Double-click table -> SELECT TOP 1000 tab (rqb.6), Refresh -> invalidate cache + remount tree (rqb.5), grey + disable non-ONLINE dbs (rqb.4). Agent gates green; live behavior is the user's tauri dev step.

Phase 2 Wave C merged in PR #15. Double-click table -> SELECT TOP 1000 tab (rqb.6), Refresh -> invalidate cache + remount tree (rqb.5), grey + disable non-ONLINE dbs (rqb.4). Agent gates green; live behavior is the user's tauri dev step.

Phase 2 (object tree) complete: core schema.rs sys.* introspection + canonical column types (rqb.1/rqb.3), lazy-loading tree UI Databases/Tables/Columns/Views (rqb.2), double-click SELECT TOP 1000 (rqb.6), Refresh (rqb.5), grey non-ONLINE (rqb.4). All 6 child beads done across PRs #13-15. Driver stays behind core throughout; v1 nodes only.
query.rs + query_store.rs: SavedQuery/Param/SqlType/ParamScope data model + QueryStore persistence (mirrors connection_store). 13 tests, all gates green, plan+code reviewed clean.

param_bind.rs (BindValue/parse_bind_value closed 9-arm/splice_raw_text single-pass/ResolvedParam/partition) + executor::run_with_params (sp_executesql named bind vs raw-text splice). run refactored to share connect/apply_use/query_stream_to_result (behavior-preserving). CoreError::Param added. +22 headless +5 integration; all gates green; plan+code reviewed clean. F5 single-result-on-bind deferred (billz-u2t).

Saved-query library UI: app-layer QueryStore commands (list/save/delete, mirror connection commands) + api.ts types/wrappers + SavedQueryLibrary.svelte (promote current tab / search / open) + sidebar Objects⇄Library toggle. params:[] on promote (d28.5 detectParams seam unbuilt); open=SQL-into-tab (d28.3 run flow separate). +11 bun tests; all gates green (fmt/clippy/cargo/ui-check/ui-test/ui-build); plan+code reviewed clean.
Per-tab DB picker implemented and confirmed working live against E4DEVSQL01 (2-part query resolves against selected DB via USE [db]). Gates green.

Connection reuse for schema introspection shipped via PR #21 (squash-merged to main). Plan→plan-review→TDD impl→3x code-review→final-review pipeline; final review READY TO MERGE with 132 headless + 11 live tests green. Deferred items filed as beads.
Reactive guard closes the stale edit-form on delete; agent-reviewed LGTM, gates green, merged via PR #22.
bigint now crosses JSON as CellValue::BigInt(String); agent-reviewed LGTM, gates green, merged PR #23.
Width-aware friendly_type_name via Column.max_length; widths verified against driver dispatch, agent-reviewed, gates green, merged PR #24.
Shared databases.svelte.ts store; single load trigger, race guard, tree+picker consistent. Agent-reviewed LGTM, gates green, merged PR #25.
Retry only on transport errors (CoreError::Transport + map_driver_error classifier); classification verified vs driver + unit-tested. Agent-reviewed, gates green, merged PR #26.

Parameterized run + Local remember-last-value shipped via PR #27. Pipeline: mockup-approved design → plan-review (3 blockers fixed) → 4 TDD tasks → code-review → final review READY TO MERGE. gates green.

Param scope tiers (Session/Global stores, resolve precedence, scope selector, inherited badge) shipped via PR #28. Pipeline: mockup-approved → plan-review → 4 TDD tasks → code-review → final review READY TO MERGE (gates run live). gates green.
